title: Calibration & Reliability Diagrams
tagline: Why a softmax of 0.97 doesn't mean 97% — and the one-parameter fix that often heals it
summary: Train a tiny classifier live; draw the reliability diagram (binned predicted vs empirical accuracy); compare ECE, MCE, Brier and NLL side-by-side. Slide the temperature-scaling parameter and watch the calibration error collapse without changing accuracy. The lab takeaway: any deployed sustainability model should ship with a reliability plot.
highlights: Live training of a 3-class RBF logistic-regression classifier; reliability diagram updates after each step.
ECE / MCE / Brier / NLL bars side-by-side so you can see which metric responds to what.
Temperature-scaling slider that collapses ECE without touching accuracy — the cheapest UQ upgrade in DL.
Lab-aligned: deployed sensor / AQ / health models should ship with a reliability plot.
